flavor: Zebediah Killgrave's chemically –modified pheromones influence everybody in close proximity.
name: Purple Man
text: [star] Purple Man's SCH is equal to the highest SCH or THW among characters in play. His ATK is equal to the highest ATK among characters in play.

name: Indomitable Will
text: [star] Hinder 3[per_hero]. When Revealed: Place 2 pheromone counters on each Suggestion obligation in play. Forced Response: After a Suggestion obligation enters play, place 2 (additional) pheromone counters on it.

name: Suggestion
text: Uses (3 pheromone counters). Forced Action: Exhaust this card and remove 1 pheromone counter from it → choose to either play a card that has a printed [energy] resource icon (paying its costs) or add 2 threat to the main scheme.

text: Uses (3 pheromone counters). Forced Action: Exhaust this card and remove 1 pheromone counter from it → choose to either play a card that has a printed [mental] resource icon (paying its costs) or add 2 threat to the main scheme.
